title: sterculia lanceifolia
intro: Sterculia lanceifolia is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the sterculia tree or lance-leaf sterculia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sterculia lanceifolia include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. In traditional herbal medicine, Sterculia lanceifolia is often prepared by boiling its roots and leaves in water, or by making a decoction from its bark and leaves.
